query: ALTER TABLE resource_links ADD COLUMN `name` varchar(300) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `id`; ALTER TABLE resource_links ADD COLUMN `comment` text AFTER `name`; UPDATE resource_links SET `name` = name_sv, `comment` = desc_sv; ALTER TABLE resource_links DROP COLUMN category, DROP COLUMN name_sv, DROP COLUMN name_en, DROP COLUMN desc_sv, DROP COLUMN desc_en;
